title: Device Home Screen - No device connected - Select Device link
scenario: "Other devices" button on home screen opens Poly support web page when no device is connected
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with no device connected.
Observe the 'Select Device' link displayed on the Home screen.
Observe the list of supported Poly devices with images.
Scroll to the bottom of the device list.
expected: Tapping 'Other devices' opens the Poly support web page in a browser.
